title: ZoomitSky
body:
This mod implements a normal zoom and a cinematic zoom with multiple modes and customizable settings. Perfect for exploration, content creators, and players looking for an enhanced visual experience.

# Mod features:

## Two Zoom Modes
- **Normal Zoom (Z):** Clean and fast zoom without visual distractions.
- **Cinematic Zoom (C):** Includes cinematic black bars and hides the interface for professional shots.

## Two Control Styles
- **Hold Down:** Hold the key to zoom (classic mode).
- **Press Once:** Press to activate/deactivate zoom (ideal for long shots).
- Switch between modes with a single key (customizable from keyboard settings).

## Adjustable Zoom with Scroll
Use the mouse wheel to dynamically adjust the zoom level.

## Adaptive Sensitivity
Mouse sensitivity is automatically reduced with zoom to improve control and precision even at maximum zoom.

## Reset Zoom
Resets the zoom level to default values with a single key.

## In-Game Configuration
Adjust zoom behavior directly from the Mod Menu config screen — no need to edit files manually.

## Controls
| Action | Default Key |
|---|---|
| Normal Zoom | Z |
| Cinematic Zoom | C |
| Toggle Control Style | V |
| Reset Zoom | (Empty) |

All keys are fully configurable.

## Dependencies
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu (for config screen)
- Cloth Config (for config screen)
